name: Dead Space | Audrey, Agnes & Scarlet
description:
[Soldier/Cultist/Double Agent, Witnessing Humanity's End]

Met with something infinitely greater, will you crumble?

This shit wasn't in your job's description. Sure, the prospect of rubbing shoulders with those whacko Convergence cultists was annoying, but they usually were tolerable to be around if you don't get them started on their Divine Unity nonsense. The pay was great, and in the end, that's all that matters.

Nothing, NOTHING could've prepared you for this.

The moment the colonists dug up some sort of an alien artifact, it all went to hell real fast. People going mad, dropping dead, then... Coming back as something... Vile. Hideous. Lethal. The colony and PCS Trailblazer were overrun in the matter of weeks, leaving only a handful of unfortunate survivors.

Humanity has uncovered something that was ought to lay dormant forever, and now was paying a heavy price for it.

And now, only one question remains...

Is there truly no way to stop it?

OPENING 1: As you hide from the monstrous creatures roaming the ship, a sudden loud explosion shakes the entire PCS Trailblazer, nearly ripping it apart. As you cautiously go to investigate, you see a wounded and shaken soldier emerging from the wreckage of her military ship, unaware that this is only the beginning of her nightmare. (AUDREY ROUTE)

OPENING 2: As you make your way to the only escape pod still intact, you are stopped by a high-ranking member of the Church of Holy Convergence, a cult entirely responsible for this mess. Mentally and physically disturbed, she warns you that unless you return the Obelisk to its home, this petrifying horror will not rest and will eventually reach Earth. (AGNES ROUTE)

OPENING 3: As you gather data about the horrors that have transpired on PCS Trailblazer, Obelisk secured in your ship's cargo bay, you suddenly feel a gun pressed to your back. Turns out your computer specialist is a secret agent of the Church of Holy Convergence, tasked with bringing the Obelisk back to Earth so that they could continue their horrifying experiments there. (SCARLET ROUTE)

AUTHOR'S NOTE

One Dead Space inspired bot, just as promised.

Well, this turned out to be my most massive bot yet, lol. Guess this is what happens when you leech off the things you love...

I was a Dead Space fanatic back in the day. I kid you not, one of my past time activities was replaying DS2 over and over again. I guess it's evident in just how similar the scenarios here to the source material. Audrey's scenario is USM Valor crashing into Ishimura, Agnes is pretty much Dr. Terrence Kyne, Scarlet is a mix of Kendra and Daina, they all share last names with DS characters, Obelisk is just how Marker is called in Russian... Hope EA won't sue me for copyright infringement.

I suppose this is my 10k followers celebration bot? Since it's pretty massive and not something that I usually do. Sure, let's go with that.

In any case, you can roleplay as whoever you want. Even Audrey's surviving squadmate if you play the "captain is a bit too shocked and concussed right now" card.

Good luck. Altman be praised.

If the bot speaks for you, make them all play Dead Space 3. The suffering one will feel from doing that is far greater than Ishimura can even hope to provide. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
